sources.title: NOAA Shoreline Data Explorer
sources.coverage: National historical and modern shoreline discovery
sources.use: Authoritative download portal for the actual NOAA shoreline vector packages.

sources.title: Key West Island – Shoreline of Western End, GC20A10
sources.use: Pre-Trumbo historical shoreline source. Project extent is mapped locally.

sources.title: Key West – Waterfront, GC20A04
sources.use: Highest-priority shoreline source for the Trumbo railway transformation. Project extent is mapped locally.

sources.title: Key West Harbor, PH5805
sources.use: Mid-century shoreline and harbor-feature source. Project extent is mapped locally.

sources.title: Shoreline Mapping Program of Key West, FL1611-TB-N
sources.use: High-resolution modern shoreline reference. Project extent is mapped locally.

sources.title: NOAA Continually Updated Shoreline Product (CUSP)
sources.coverage: Live service; Key West request is spatially clipped by the application
sources.use: Modern mean-high-water proxy comparison line. Not equivalent to the higher-control National Shoreline.

sources.title: Preliminary Coast Chart No. 71, Florida Reefs
sources.institution: United States Coast Survey / Wikimedia Commons
sources.coverage: 1859 western Florida Keys and Key West
sources.use: Earliest detailed island-wide chart currently assigned to the project; public domain.

sources.title: Admiralty Chart No. 2881, Key West Harbour and Approaches
sources.use: Pre-terminal harbor chart; public-domain source image.

sources.title: Georeferenced 1907 Key West Harbour chart, map 4655
sources.coverage: Key West harbor and approaches; five control points
sources.use: Live raster tile overlay for visual comparison. Interpretation-grade, not survey-grade.

sources.title: Flagler Overseas Railway Timeline
sources.coverage: Railway construction, Trumbo terminal, and abandonment chronology
sources.use: Dates the 134-acre landfill reference, first Trumbo spike, first train, terminal facilities, and 1935 closure.

sources.title: NAS Key West environmental site descriptions
sources.coverage: Trumbo Point, Fleming Key, Sigsbee, and other Navy properties
sources.use: Official description of Trumbo as a 140-acre landfill area created in 1908 and later military land uses.

sources.title: Sanborn Fire Insurance Map from Key West, April 1889
sources.coverage: Sixteen sheets; built city and waterfront
sources.use: Public-domain control evidence for streets, wharves, structures, and the pre-rail city.

sources.title: Sanborn Fire Insurance Map from Key West, April 1899
sources.coverage: Twenty-four sheets; built city and waterfront
sources.use: Public-domain pre-rail urban and waterfront reference.

sources.title: Florida Aerial Photography Collection
sources.use: Primary source for wartime and postwar shoreline reconstruction.

sources.title: Florida Memory photographic collections
sources.institution: State Library and Archives of Florida
sources.coverage: Key West waterfront, military, railway, and aerial imagery
sources.use: Dated photographs for interpretation and corroboration.

sources.title: Florida Keys History Center digital collections
sources.coverage: Key West and Florida Keys maps and photographs
sources.use: Local source for Trumbo Point, terminal piers, railway infrastructure, and aerial views.
